issues.description: Dead markup: `pipelineChartsGrid` contains 5 canvas elements (`pipelineRunsChart`, `pipelineErrorChart`, `pipelineCompletionChart`, `pipelineQualityChart`, `pipelineTestChart`) that have no corresponding JavaScript to render or display them. The container has `display:none` and `renderPipeline()` never references any of these canvas IDs. These will silently never render. Either add the chart-rendering logic to `renderPipeline()` (and call `pipelineChartsGrid.style.display = 'grid'` when data exists), or remove these placeholder elements until the implementation is complete.

dateRangeMonths: Math.max(1, NaN) returns NaN, not 1. If dateRange.from or dateRange.to contains an invalid (non-null) date string, months becomes NaN and saving badges display '~NaN tokens/mo'. Add: if (isNaN(from.getTime()) || isNaN(to.getTime())) return 1; after constructing the Date objects.

saving.tokens is set in all 4 recommendation push sites but never read — renderRecommendations only uses rec.saving.label. Either remove the tokens field or add a comment explaining it is reserved for future sort-by-impact use.
